summary: Iteration 118 - WebSocket Earnings Broadcast End-to-End Testing. All 6 features verified: (1) WebSocket /ws/earnings/{user_id} connects and responds with correct message format, (2) Gallery purchase triggers broadcast_earnings_update with type 'new_sale' (gallery.py lines 18, 710-722), (3) Booking payment triggers broadcast_earnings_update with type 'booking_paid' (bookings.py lines 23, 379-390, 694-707), (4) Stoke sponsorship triggers broadcast_earnings_update with type 'tip_received' (career.py lines 22, 747-757), (5) EarningsDashboard handles all 4 update types (new_sale, booking_paid, tip_received, payout_complete) with different toast messages (lines 353-386), (6) All backend routes correctly import broadcast_earnings_update from websocket_manager.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket /ws/earnings/{user_id} endpoint properly defined in websocket.py (lines 81-109)
broadcast_earnings_update function in websocket_manager.py (lines 102-119) creates user-specific room and sends correct message format
gallery.py imports broadcast_earnings_update (line 18) and calls it after purchase with type='new_sale' (lines 710-722)
bookings.py imports broadcast_earnings_update (line 23) and calls it after join_booking (lines 379-390) and invite acceptance (lines 694-707) with type='booking_paid'
career.py imports broadcast_earnings_update (line 22) and calls it after stoke sponsorship with type='tip_received' (lines 747-757)
EarningsDashboard.js handleEarningsUpdate callback handles all 4 types: new_sale, booking_paid, tip_received, payout_complete (lines 353-386)
useEarningsSync hook in useWebSocket.js (lines 151-161) correctly matches 'earnings_update' message type from backend

success_rate.frontend: 100% (App loads, login works, Wallet page accessible)

context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket earnings broadcast implementation is complete and verified. All 3 routes (gallery.py, bookings.py, career.py) import and call broadcast_earnings_update with correct update types. Frontend EarningsDashboard handles all 4 event types with toast notifications. WebSocket endpoint /ws/earnings/{user_id} accepts connections and responds with correct message format including ping/pong support.
